textByHashes.2cede82fcbdbb74502693f735284688dd65aabc7: Oh, nothing much. I'd just heard Draynor was a nice place to visit.
textByHashes.7f089c34d94cde6bd0f94823550e43b5f5ad0e6f: Did you really think I'd fall for that?
textByHashes.078704bc95a215ca0522505615cca6d7c8524cd1: If you think I'm going to talk, you're kidding yourself!
textByHashes.b1b96a302a5fe1b3d7c574248be188e3878afb95: Oh, well, I guess I can cooperate... Down in one, right?
textByHashes.a096d420f4d48fe685757d02d860d716e47a785e: I don't know! I've never even met him!
textByHashes.eb724a6301828c77d7bc8aed5e28b8e6bfaf13fb: They call him the Dark Squall. He's super secretive! I don't know his real name!
textByHashes.6b368b4db432f325647db993adc4f2f6dbcb318d: Wait! I can tell you what he looks like!
textByHashes.6a9a6578743b2ce93f0b2b23634f422fa1bfa112: He wears a hooded burgundy robe with purple trim and a strange diamond-shaped symbol on the front. Over the top he wears a tan jacket.
textByHashes.b5a9c86c9f3035b565ba3110366a58bfcc7db863: He hides it with a red mask!
textByHashes.e2c343251dc634ae3df4cec856f92c189af376ff: That's all I know, I promise!
textByHashes.4a12ae8521d4d8e145fb8b9cc57e68fc721aecd2: Please... I can tell you what the Dark Squall looks like!
